# Untroubled by Darkness

> [!info] 💧 Event · Cost: **2** · Spirit

![[03010.png]]

---

**Action:** Each **_Dwarf_** character gets +1 WP until the end of the phase. (+2 WP instead if the active location is an **_Underground_** or **_Dark_** location.)
